description: New York Times subscription - financial and market news

articles.headline: Fed Signals Potential Rate Cut Amid Cooling Inflation
articles.author: Jeanna Smialek
articles.summary: Federal Reserve officials indicated they may begin cutting interest rates as inflation shows signs of returning to the 2% target.

articles.headline: Tech Giants Report Mixed Earnings as AI Spending Surges
articles.author: Karen Weise
articles.summary: Major technology companies revealed substantial investments in artificial intelligence infrastructure, raising questions about near-term profitability.

articles.headline: Oil Prices Surge on Middle East Supply Concerns
articles.author: Stanley Reed
articles.summary: Crude oil futures jumped 4% as geopolitical tensions threaten shipping routes through the Red Sea.

articles.headline: Housing Market Shows Signs of Recovery as Mortgage Rates Ease
articles.author: Conor Dougherty
articles.summary: Home sales increased for the third consecutive month as borrowing costs declined from recent highs.

articles.headline: Retail Sales Disappoint, Raising Recession Concerns
articles.author: Ben Casselman
articles.summary: Consumer spending fell short of expectations in April, suggesting households are becoming more cautious.
